title: Hiyori and Yasuie Reveal Wano’s Pain
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Toko, Unknown person #3, Momonosuke, Kawamatsu as Hiyori’s identity and Yasuie’s sacrifice pull the Wano rebellion into a deeper emotional crisis.
scene: Zoro protects Toko and meets Hiyori, while Yasuie prepares a sacrifice meant to rescue the rebellion’s plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're MOMONOSURE'S.... YOUNGER SISTER???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The truth comes out after 20 long years....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah! I was right!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am glad I mustered up the courage to say something!! What a GAMBLE that was!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So you do know my older brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold your horses!! Let me process all this first...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So he is still alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Since a strong and kind samural from the outside world appeared...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It must mean that you are helping my brother....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah! But you could also be an enemy that is trying to capture my brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm an ally. An A.L.L.Y.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That is a relief!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think I get it now. So this is what happened...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Momo was sent 20 years into the future...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: and stayed 8 years old.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that's why his younger sister is 26 now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, whatever... is it really okay for that kid to know about this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't worry!! I already knew!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's our little secret!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O-TOO is one of the few friends I have that knows the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her cheerful attitude has helped me to push forward...

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: AHAHA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will never forget what happened 20 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though I was just a child back then... and was even younger than O-TOko is NOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On that same day... I lost my father, oden... and my mother, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I lost everything on that day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My brother promised that he would return in 20 years, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had no faith in his uncertain promise.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is why, at that time, I lost my will to live.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why didn't you just go with them?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because... in case the plan failed, they wanted to ensure that there was a way for the Kozuki Bloodline to survive....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That must've been tough.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: ...but my father's retainer, Kawamatsu the Kappa...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: took care of me with such immense patience...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes. I am sure that it is hard for you to believe that such a demon exists... but he is proud of that fact...

dialogue.speaker: Kawamatsu
dialogue.text: A Kappa!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But he was able to dig a hole into the water channel, and we escaped without anybody noticing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Princess!! Please hold on!!

dialogue.speaker: Kawamatsu
dialogue.text: Princess! This is the KAPPA DANCE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He always tried to cheer me up...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though I had remained mute since that day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He would let himself go hungry so I could have enough to eat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ah, it's nothing but a stomach- ache!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: PSX: Groodowl

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I caught a fish in the river earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I roasted it and ate it!! Kappappa!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: little by little, he was able to make me laugh....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So... where is he now?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were separated from one another... when I was 13...

dialogue.speaker: Kawamatsu
dialogue.text: But Kawamatsu is a very strong samural!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He must be waiting some- where for the final battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I really want to see him again....!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Hiyori and Yasuie storyline with 52 dialogue beats. Hiyori and Yasuie bring the rebellion’s emotional history into the foreground.
